top_findings.title: Can search and return match data from all provided CSV files
top_findings.evidence: src/brazilian_soccer_mcp/data_loader.py:27-34 loads all 6 CSV files; find_matches tool in server.py:57-73 provides query interface; tests/test_data_loader.py::TestDataStoreLoads::test_all_six_files_loaded passes

top_findings.title: Can search and return player data
top_findings.evidence: src/brazilian_soccer_mcp/data_loader.py:33 loads fifa_data.csv; find_players and top_brazilian_players tools in server.py:118-140 provide query interface; tests/test_bdd_queries.py::TestPlayerQueries passes all player tests

top_findings.title: Can calculate basic statistics (wins, losses, goals)
top_findings.evidence: SoccerQueries.team_stats, standings, biggest_wins, average_goals_per_match methods in src/brazilian_soccer_mcp/queries.py; all statistical tests pass

top_findings.title: Handles team name variations correctly
top_findings.evidence: src/brazilian_soccer_mcp/team_names.py implements normalize() and loose_key() functions; tests/test_team_names.py verifies handling of accents, state suffixes, variants (Athletico vs Atletico); tests/test_bdd_queries.py::TestDataQuality passes all name normalization tests
